questionHtml: Complete the half-equations on the diagram and identify the species moving between the electrodes.
markschemeHtml:
Accept any balanced equation which shows Li oxidized to Li+ for M3, such as

LiC6 → Li+ + C6 + e–     or

LixC6 → xLi+ + 6C + xe–

[3 marks]

meta.title: Complete the half-equations on the diagram and identify the species moving between the electrodes.
breadcrumbLabels: C.6 Electrochemistry, rechargeable batteries and fuel cells (HL only)
